rulings.Case Title: SHELBY YAMIN ET AL VS. DEBBIE ODIYE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Debbie Odiye'S Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 21, 2016 line 3. PLAINTIFF SHELBY YAMIN, JAMES PANNELL's Motion To Compel Defendant Debbie Odiye'S Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions moot, responses provided on November 7, 2016. Plaintiff's request for sanctions granted in the amount of $2,510 to be paid within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant provides no argument or evidence in opposition justifying failure to timely respond to discovery. = (501/SRB)
